headline: Citi Revises DOW Outlook amid Emerging Demand Destruction Concerns
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 4.16%, Dow Inc. (NYSE:DOW) is included among the Top 10 High Dividend Stocks to Invest In According to Analysts. On May 27, Citi analyst Patrick Cunningham lowered the price recommendation on Dow Inc. (NYSE:DOW) to $41 from $48. He reiterated a Buy rating on the stock. The firm reduced its […]
